behavior_summary: U8P_SKULLHEA::look is a simple examine handler that displays the short description 'The Skull of Quakes' when the player looks at the item.

U8P_SKULLHEA::use implements a one-time activation sequence for the Skull of Quakes: it guards against reuse, prompts the player to pick a target, verifies the target type, places the skull onto that target, marks the skull used, triggers a camera quake and SFX, runs an NPC animation and a fade-to-black cutscene while temporarily teleporting an actor for staging, sets the global postEarthQuake flag, returns the actor to the saved location, fades back, and stops the quake effect.
notable_control_flow: Guard: U8P_SKULLHEA::use first checks Item::getQ(this) and aborts if nonzero to prevent reactivation.
Input/suspend: U8P_SKULLHEA::use obtains a process target via pid <=> process target() and suspends to capture the player's selection into local1.
Validation branch: if selection is nonzero and Item::getType(local1) == 0x0325 then the activation sequence proceeds; otherwise the U8P_SKULLHEA::use ends without performing the event.
Placement and state change: Item::push(this) followed by Item::pop(...) places the skull relative to the target, then Item::setQ(0x01, this) marks it used.

Event sequence: the script saves returned coordinates, starts Camera::startQuake, plays SFX, spawns/waits for Npc::doAnim and FadeToBlack/FadeFromBlack processes, teleports an actor (Npc::teleport) to/from a staging location, sets the postEarthQuake global flag, and finally stops the quake with Camera::stopQuake.
open_questions: What concrete game object/type does the numeric target type 0x0325 represent (which in-game object is a valid target)?
Which NPC or actor is being animated and teleported during the cutscene (metadata infers 'an NPC' but the exact actor id/role is not explicit)?
What exact SFX id(s) and parameters are played during the quake sequence?
Are there any other scripts that read postEarthQuake to gate later content (the presence and effect of this flag elsewhere is inferred but not shown)?

main_function.name: U8P_SKULLHEA::look
main_function.purpose: Display the item's short description when the player examines the Skull of Quakes.
entry_conditions: Player performs the U8P_SKULLHEA::look/examine action on the Skull of Quakes (object-type U8P_SKULLHEA::look handler invoked).

function_map.name: U8P_SKULLHEA::use
function_map.role: one-time activation / cutscene coordinator for the skull item

external_calls.purpose: Check whether this skull instance is already marked/used (nonzero aborts activation).
Obtain the player's selected target/process when using the item; result suspended into local1.
Verify the selected target's type equals 0x0325 before permitting placement/activation.
Temporarily attach/stack the skull for relative placement computations.
Place the skull into world coordinates computed from the target (uses offsets like z+0x10, y-0x08, x).
Mark the item Q flag (0x01) to record that the skull was activated and prevent reuse.
Read saved X coordinate from the push/pop context to restore an actor's position later.
Read saved Y coordinate from the push/pop context to restore an actor's position later.
Read saved map/Z coordinate from the push/pop context to restore an actor's location later.
Begin a camera earthquake visual effect for the activation sequence.
Play quake/event sound effects during the sequence.
Trigger an NPC animation as part of the cutscene; spawned and waited on.
Run a fade-to-black transition to stage the cutscene, the script waits for it to finish.
Temporarily teleport an NPC/player to a staging location for the cutscene and later teleport them back.
Obtain the map id from the push/pop context to compute teleport source/destination.
Fade back in after the cutscene completes.
Stop the camera earthquake effect when the event sequence completes.

writes.name: postEarthQuake
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when the skull-triggered earthquake sequence completes; used to record that the event occurred for other game logic.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_SKULLHEA::look is a simple examine handler that displays the short description 'The Skull of Quakes' when the player looks at the item.
